_meta.role: Wayfarer's Inn 旅店主人，衣著整潔、性情平和。處理住宿買賣對話。

translations.en: a well-dressed man with a very even temper.
translations.zh: 一名衣著得體、性情極為平和的男子。

translations.note: 保留 $T；無結尾引號（接續句）

translations.en: "I am Peyton, and this is my place." He gestures with his hands.
translations.zh: 「在下佩頓，此處便是小店。」他以雙手示意。

translations.en: "I can offer you a @room for the evening."
translations.zh: 「在下可為汝備一間@room（客房）過夜。」

translations.en: "I'm sure you'll have to ask another."
"#0 gold for bed and breakfast. Interested?"
translations.zh: 「#0 金幣，含床位早膳。可有興致？」

translations.note: yes/no prompt 系統 keyword，保留 ASCII

translations.en: "Well, perhaps next time you're in town."
You sleep in a comfortable bed...
translations.zh: 汝在舒適的床榻上酣然入睡……

translations.en: You wake rested and eat a large breakfast.
translations.zh: 汝精神飽滿地醒來，享用了一頓豐盛早膳。

translations.en: "Good morning, and have a good day."
You don't have enough gold for that.
translations.zh: 汝身上的金幣不夠付帳。

translations.en: "I'm sorry, cash in advance. That's our policy."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，須先付清。此乃小店規矩。」

translations.en: Your party takes up a collection to pay for the rooms.
translations.zh: 汝這一行人湊了份子，付清了房錢。

translator_notes: Peyton 為旅店掌櫃，語氣平和有禮，自稱『在下』，稱客人『汝』。問候語『Good $T』譯為『$T安』以保留 $T 變數（時辰）。注意三段拼接式問候（offset 61/78/105/125/138）：在原版中是動態拼接的問候模板，譯文也維持片段語意，組合後仍通順。
